notes: relation_row_estimate returns visible MGA row-version count across visible catalog relations from engine-owned relation sidecars
relation_row_estimate(table_uuid) returns visible MGA row-version count for the requested relation from engine-owned relation sidecars
relation_row_estimate(table_uuid) propagates SQL null table_uuid input before MGA relation sidecar lookup
relation_row_estimate(table_uuid) returns SQL null for an unknown MGA relation sidecar UUID without parser SQL or donor lookup
table_size returns catalog-wide stable byte estimate from MGA relation metadata row versions and index sidecars
table_size(table_uuid) includes MGA relation sidecar and index sidecar estimates by default
table_size table_uuid false returns row-store and MGA relation sidecar estimate without index sidecars
table_size(table_uuid) propagates SQL null table_uuid input before MGA relation sidecar lookup
table_size table_uuid include_indexes propagates SQL null include_indexes input before MGA relation sidecar sizing
table_size(table_uuid) returns SQL null for an unknown MGA relation sidecar UUID
